name: dry-codes
description: Reuse before you write. Bundles the dry-codes skill + the hosted DRY.codes MCP server (dry.codes) so Codex searches indexed code and docs for an existing implementation before writing a new one, and catches near-duplicates. Sign in on first use and pick which corpus to search — your own indexed repos or the public corpus.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse before you write — search indexed code & docs.
interface.longDescription: Searches DRY.codes (a hosted MCP server) for existing code and docs to reuse, and flags near-duplicates — so Codex looks for an implementation before writing one. Sign in on first use and pick your own indexed repos or the public corpus.
